title: What brotherhood actually costs
caption:
Most men have an audience, not brothers.

You have a group chat that hypes you up, a gym partner who never asks you anything hard, and maybe a church friend who you've known for three years but never told the truth to. You call it community. It's not.

Real brotherhood costs the honesty you'd rather swallow. It costs your comfort on the wrong day. It costs being the one who goes first — the one who breaks the silence.

Two men. Not a small group of twelve. Two men who know your sin and still show up. That's what Scripture means when it talks about iron sharpening iron.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16

Save this for the brother still waiting for someone else to go first.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #accountability #manofgod #godlymen #scripture #christianity
